curation_notes: Patch commit a79b65c adds bounds checking (count > xsize) to both expandrow and expandrow2 functions in SgiRleDecode.c. Only one non-test source file was changed. Locations derived directly from the patch diff — the advisory explicitly names the file and the patch modifies exactly these two functions. The vulnerability class buffer-overflow matches the CWE-120 (Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input) assigned to this CVE.
